query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS payments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  bookingId INT NOT NULL,
  ownerId INT NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('deposit','final','partial','refund','other') DEFAULT 'deposit' NOT NULL,
  method ENUM('bank_transfer','cash','credit_card','eftpos','other') DEFAULT 'bank_transfer' NOT NULL,
  paidAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fnb_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  runsheetId INT NOT NULL,
  ownerId INT NOT NULL,
  section ENUM('foh','kitchen') DEFAULT 'foh' NOT NULL,
  course VARCHAR(100),
  dishName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  qty INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  dietary VARCHAR(255),
  serviceTime VARCHAR(10),
  prepNotes TEXT,
  platingNotes TEXT,
  staffAssigned VARCHAR(255),
  sortOrder INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS analytics_goals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ownerId INT NOT NULL,
  year INT NOT NULL,
  month INT NOT NULL,
  targetRevenue DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
